title: The Pear-Shaped Man's Last Tenant
author: Barış Kısır
short_description: A building superintendent in a crumbling Chicago tenement discovers the basement holds a being that can reshape flesh perfectly — and that every tenant who's met it has willingly traded their human form for something monstrous.
long_description: A building superintendent in a crumbling Chicago tenement discovers the basement holds a being that can reshape flesh perfectly — and that every tenant who's met it has willingly traded their human form for something monstrous.
